The Garden

No investors.
No paywalls.
Just gardeners.

Most AI charges $20-50/month.

We asked a different question:

What if we just... didn't?

Seeds, not subscriptions.

Ferni doesn't have investors demanding growth.
It has a community planting seeds.

When people who can afford to give a little do, everyone benefits. No paywalls. No premium tiers. No "upgrade to unlock" moments right when you need support most.

Gardeners, not customers.

Contributors aren't buying a product.
They're nurturing something alive.

And free users? They're gardeners too— tending to the garden just by showing up. Every conversation helps Ferni grow.

When enough people give a little,
everyone gets a lot.

Life coaching shouldn't be a luxury.
Someone to talk to shouldn't cost $200/session.
Support at 3am shouldn't require a premium plan.

Plant a seed.

If you can, contribute what feels right.
If you can't, just use Ferni. That's enough.

Plant a Seed Or just begin a conversation

Good things take time.

We're preparing something meaningful. Be first to experience it.

I'd love to personally welcome you when you're in.

Just one email when we're ready. No noise.

I'll be in touch.

Take care of yourself in the meantime.

Feel free to look around...

We use cookies to improve your experience. Learn more
